description.value: The Explorer gains access to a new Psychic Discipline, and may select techniques from this new field of study as his abilities increase. Psykers may access a maximum of three separate Disciplines.

system.benefit: The Explorer gains access to a new Psychic Discipline. Psykers may access a maximum of three separate Disciplines.

specialAbilities.name: New Discipline
specialAbilities.description: You gain access to a new Psychic Discipline and may select techniques from it as your abilities increase.
